summary.what: Cut v0.20.0 release with changelog and site examples
summary.why: v0.20.0 captures the compact prime UX shift plus follow-up fixes and the embedded-JSONL sync model — releasing now lets external installs pick up the smaller session-context payload before more agents hit it
summary.how: just release 0.20.0 generated CHANGELOG.md via draft changelog | claude -p --model opus, regenerated decision-log and release-notes site examples, bumped the landing-page version badge, committed, tagged, and pushed origin main + v0.20.0 — GitHub Actions will build the binaries and publish the release
